case_title: LEASECOMM CORPORATION vs. GILLEN, HEATHER DBA ROSEWATER SKINCARE

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GILLEN, HEATHER DBA ROSEWATER SKINCARE
